name: Should I focus on Google, Apple, Bing, or Yelp for voice search near me?
description: Focus on all major platforms, not just one. Consistent business data across Google, Apple, Bing, Yelp, and your site gives the best local signal.

mainEntity.name: Should I focus on Google, Apple, Bing, or Yelp for voice search near me?

acceptedAnswer.text: For local voice search, comparison usually comes down to Google Business Profile, Apple Business Connect, Bing Places, Yelp, and your own website. The best setup is not one platform alone; it is consistent data across all of them.
acceptedAnswer.description: Focus on all major platforms, not just one. Consistent business data across Google, Apple, Bing, Yelp, and your site gives the best local signal.
